DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be dispatched with APU START SYS faults provided APU is started before departure and operated continuously throughout the flight.

ListItem.Para: Increase flight planning fuel by either using an airplane drag correction factor of 1.0% or increase the flight planning fuel by 1.2% with APU running and also increase planning fuel by 250 lb (114 kg) per hour of APU usage inflight and 480 lb (218 kg) per hour of APU usage on the ground.
Start the APU before departure and operate the APU continuously throughout the flight.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be dispatched with APU START SYS faults provided:

ListItem.Para: EDTO beyond 180 minutes is not conducted.

MaintenanceNote.Para: A VFSG system is considered to be operating normally if its associated status message (ELEC GEN SYS L1, L2, R1 or R2) is not displayed.

OperationNote.Para: For APU not available for engine start, start the first engine using the Ground Power Engine Start Supplementary Procedure.
